mano_cua.result_summary: 应用跳转到登录页（/login），内嵌 batnoter.com 演示。外层有深色模式开关（月亮/太阳图标）但内嵌演示区无深色模式。需要 GitHub 登录才能进入实际编辑器，无法测试深色模式下的代码块渲染。backend_risk 预期。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: App redirects to /login page with embedded batnoter.com demo. Outer page has dark mode toggle but embedded demo does not. Requires GitHub login to access actual editor. Cannot test dark mode code block rendering. backend_risk as expected.
